items.title_en: Auto-state lawmakers seek to keep certain Chinese vehicles out of U.S. as Trump heads to Beijing

items.title_en: New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani's pied-à-terre property tax is moving ahead. But will it work?

items.desc_zh: 纽约正在其预算中推进临时住所财产税。世界主要城市的现有税收显示了该政策的局限性。

items.title_en: Uganda's president sworn in for record seventh term

items.desc_en: Yoweri Museveni, 81, won disputed elections in January to extend his 40-year rule.
items.desc_zh: 81 岁的约韦里·穆塞韦尼 (Yoweri Museveni) 在 1 月份赢得了有争议的选举，延长了他 40 年的统治。

items.desc_zh: 她在一次欧盟峰会上表示，专家小组将于 7 月份就如何保护未成年人上网制定措施。

items.title_en: Mexico cancels plans to end school year early for World Cup
items.title_zh: 墨西哥取消为世界杯提前结束学年的计划
items.desc_en: Parents were angry at a proposal to end classes on 5 June instead of 15 July due to the tournament and expected extreme heat.
items.desc_zh: 家长们对因锦标赛而于 6 月 5 日而不是 7 月 15 日结束课程的提议感到愤怒，并且预计会出现极热天气。

items.title_en: Canvas hack: company pays criminals to delete students' stolen data

items.desc_zh: Canvas 背后的公司表示，它已经与扰乱数千所学院和大学的黑客“达成协议”。

items.desc_en: The lawsuit comes amid increased scrutiny over platform features like auto-play that deliver endless content to users.
items.desc_zh: 此次诉讼发生之际，人们对自动播放等向用户提供无尽内容的平台功能进行了越来越严格的审查。

items.title_en: No sign of larger hantavirus outbreak, says UN health agency

items.desc_en: The situation could still change and there might be more confirmed cases, warns the head of the World Health Organization.
items.desc_zh: 世界卫生组织负责人警告说，情况仍可能发生变化，可能会出现更多确诊病例。

items.desc_zh: 霍尔木兹海峡的有效关闭严重扰乱了全球能源和石化产品的供应。

items.desc_en: Woodworking shops have been transformed by tech to make tools safer and more precise.
items.desc_zh: 木工车间已经被技术改造，使工具更安全、更精确。

items.title_en: Trump says Iran ceasefire is on 'massive life support'
items.title_zh: 特朗普称伊朗停火是“巨大的生命支持”
items.desc_en: The US president criticises an Iranian counteroffer to end the war, and says the month-long ceasefire is "unbelievably weak".
items.desc_zh: 美国总统批评伊朗提出的结束战争的还价，并表示为期一个月的停火“软弱得令人难以置信”。

items.desc_zh: 虽然仅向部分 TikTok 用户推出，但该功能由人工智能生成的奇异描述却被广泛分享。

items.desc_zh: 该平台表示将删除端到端加密消息，这是母公司 Meta 的一个重大转变。
